titleStmt.title: SII 25.23: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 23. (A.R. No. 23 of 1908.) DĀRĀŚURAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Inner gōpura of the Airāvatēśvara temple, right of entrance.

This incomplete epigraph may palaeographically be assigned to 13-14th century. The portion referring to the regnal year is damaged. The extant details of date are the fourteenth day of the month of Tai of a regnal year (not clear).

It states that the nāṭṭavar of Ūṟṟattūr met at the temple of Rājarāja-Īśuram and agreed to provide for the services and festivals in the temple from out of the income from taxes collected. The tax collectors were empowered to collect the toll tax of half a paṇam per head; tax on cattle, one palam, per head; tax on head-load, half a paṇam per load; tax on import and export; 5 per cent and the like or else to break open the locked doors of the houses and to destroy and confiscate the vessels therein. Their remuneration is stated to have been specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapar(m)marRead tiripuvaṉatirupuvaṉa(ṉā)ccakkaravattikaḷ śrī śrīvallapa tevaṟkku yāṇṭu kku tai mātam 10 4 tikati ttuṅka(tuṅka)coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭavarom Irā rāThis is expressed by symbols. May be read as rājarājecurattu periya .
nāṭṭāṉkkakāvil niṟaivuṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Uṭaiyār Irācā curamuṭaiya(r) nāyaṉāṟku tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷukkum Uṭalāka nāṅkaḷ paṇṇikkuṭutta camayam Āvatu . per mutalppaṭiye per Oṉṟu
kku Araiyāka vanta paṇamum kaṟṟukkolukkuRead kaṉṟukālikkuper Oṉṟukku Oṉṟā ta paṇamum palata(l)laikkum per Oṉṟukku Araiyāka vanta paṇamum Eṟucāttu Iṟaṅkucāttukku nūṟṟukku Aiñcāka vanta paṇam peṟavum Aḷappaṉ mukappaḷavukkum Immātiri peṟavum Ivvakaippaṭi taṇṭik koḷḷum Iṭattu Aṭaitta katavu taḷḷiyum maṇkalantakattum veṇkalam Ippaṭi taṇṭikkoḷḷavum Ippaṭikku
t taṇṭi vantavarkaḷukku lli kkap pāvāṭai ciṟu Aricip ppā ppaṭi veṟṟilai Ippaṭikku veṇṭuṅ kuṟaivaṟuppukaḷu kuṟai vaṟukkak kaṭaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
